since_last: 71% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.66%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.03% · BTC -2.82% · Gold -2.64% · Nasdaq100 +2.39%. 71% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.66%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.66%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +11.58%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +11.58%, INTC +10.80%, SMR +10.35%, CRNC +9.80%, MU +9.55%. Laggards: INOD -8.19%, SPCX -6.19%, IBM -4.55%, WDAY -2.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.19% at $179.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
